messages.message: Comments inside children section of tag should be placed inside braces

Box 52137, Dubai – UAE", phone: "+971 4 238 4400" }, { city: "Abu Dhabi", address: "Madinat Zayed Office Tower, 12th Floor, Sultan Bin Zayed the First Street, P.O.
